title: Device Home Screen - Battery life
scenario: Battery life display on Device Home Screen shows correct icons (single for headset, H/C for headset with case, L/R/C for earbuds) with color-coded charge levels and greys out with last known percentage when headset is turned off.
steps: 1. Pair and connect headset, start app, go to Device Home Screen.
2. Observe battery percentage display on Device Home Screen.
4. Observe battery icons on Device Home Screen.
expected: Step 1-2: Battery percentage is shown. For headsets, a single battery icon is shown. For headsets with a charge case, two icons marked "H" and "C" are displayed. For earbuds, three icons marked "L", "R", and "C" are shown. Battery icon color corresponds to charge level: 100%-40% black (white in dark mode), 39%-20% yellow, 19%-1% red, 0% empty. Step 3-4: Battery icons are greyed out with last known percentage displayed.
